intent.audience: Operators evaluating a new OpenDevBrowser design flow
intent.task: Understand the primary page value and complete the intended action quickly
successCriteria: Primary action is obvious within 5 seconds
Layout remains coherent on desktop, tablet, and mobile

semanticTokenSource.rule: Use semantic tokens in repeated UI; reserve raw values for rare one-off illustration

contentModel.primaryMessage: Show the core value immediately with real copy
contentModel.loadingStrategy: Preserve the final layout with 3-6 placeholders or one section-level loader when structure cannot be previewed
contentModel.emptyStateStrategy: Explain why nothing is shown and provide the next useful action
contentModel.errorStateStrategy: Keep retry or recovery actions close to the failed region
contentModel.transientFeedbackStrategy: Use short, non-blocking overlays for confirmations instead of reflowing the main layout

navigationModel.primaryRouteModel: One canonical route map translates tabs, selected records, and editor modes into URL-backed state
navigationModel.deepLinkPolicy: Shareable tabs, filters, sort, and selected entities stay in the URL with a safe fallback when params are stale or incomplete
navigationModel.invalidRouteFallback: Recover to the closest safe baseline view instead of leaving the screen in a partially initialized state

asyncModel.owner: feature-local controller with URL-owned query state when sharing or refresh matters
asyncModel.loadTrigger: load-on-enter for the first view; debounced restart on query, scope, or sort change
asyncModel.emptyQueryBehavior: Reset to the baseline or empty state without a remote fetch unless the product explicitly needs default results
asyncModel.cancellationPolicy: Treat stale requests as normal and do not surface cancellation as a user-facing error
moveToServiceWhen: caching or retry policy becomes shared
multiple screens depend on the same in-flight state
asyncModel.urlOwnership: Put query, filter, and sort in the URL when the state should survive refresh, sharing, or handoff

alignmentRules: Primary content aligns to a consistent reading column
Actions stay near the message they complete

typographySystem.fallbackPolicy: Use repo-native or licensed alternatives when these families are unavailable
typographySystem.loadingStrategy: Avoid layout shift and keep fallback metrics close

performanceModel.stableIdentityPolicy: Rows, cards, tabs, and overlays use stable domain ids instead of array indexes
performanceModel.listStrategy: Use the smallest structure that stays fast with realistic data; choose progressive reveal, lazy containers, or virtualization deliberately
performanceModel.secondaryPanelPolicy: Heavy inspectors, previews, and editors load on demand when they are not required for first paint
performanceModel.measurementPlan: Validate realistic data volume with browser traces and the framework profiler before claiming the surface is performant

adaptationRules: Collapse multicolumn sections before copy becomes cramped
Preserve primary CTA prominence on the smallest viewport
responsiveSystem.touchPolicy: Comfortable targets and low-friction scroll paths
responsiveSystem.overflowPolicy: No horizontal scroll for primary content

accessibilityPolicy.focusPolicy: Focus rings must remain visible against every background

targetOutcome.summary: Improve hierarchy, clarity, and conversion confidence
